---
title: "Overall_results"
author: "KW"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
overall <- readxl::read_xlsx(here::here("results/Overall_RQ_results.xlsx"))
```

```{r}
## Summary performance figure: bubble table
## Paste into 41_results.Rmd.
## Requires: dplyr, tidyr, ggplot2, scales

# 0. Data
summary_df <- tibble::tribble(
  ~Treatment,             ~Bias, ~Abs_Bias, ~ESE,
  ~Ratio, ~Coverage,    ~ATT_Bias, ~ATT_Abs_Bias,
  "No treatment",
   0.014,  0.295, 0.42, 0.82, 0.9337, -1153.98, 3121.28,
  "Top-coding",
  -0.003,  0.077, 0.12, 0.80, 0.9385,  -366.71,  607.79,
  "Mean-preserved top-coding",
   0.022,  0.163, 0.21, 0.94, 0.9441,   310.61, 3389.72,
  "Median-preserved top-coding",
   0.010,  0.120, 0.18, 0.81, 0.9438,  -743.60, 1717.10,
  "Truncation",
  -0.008,  0.084, 0.14, 0.70, 0.9145,  -149.74,  306.27
)

trt_order <- c(
  "No treatment",
  "Top-coding",
  "Mean-preserved top-coding",
  "Median-preserved top-coding",
  "Truncation"
)

trt_colors <- c(
  "No treatment"                = "#0072B2",
  "Top-coding"                  = "#E69F00",
  "Mean-preserved top-coding"   = "#009E73",
  "Median-preserved top-coding" = "#CC79A7",
  "Truncation"                  = "#D55E00"
)

summary_df <- summary_df |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = trt_order)
  )

# 1. Rank each metric
# Bias, ATT_Bias    : closest to 0
# Abs_Bias, ESE, ATT_Abs_Bias : lower = better
# Ratio, Coverage : higher = better (negate before ranking)

rank_df <- summary_df |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    r_Bias         = rank(
      abs(Bias), ties.method = "min"
    ),
    r_Abs_Bias     = rank(
      Abs_Bias, ties.method = "min"
    ),
    r_ESE          = rank(
      ESE, ties.method = "min"
    ),
    r_Ratio        = rank(
      -Ratio, ties.method = "min"
    ),
    r_Coverage     = rank(
      -Coverage, ties.method = "min"
    ),
    r_ATT_Bias     = rank(
      abs(ATT_Bias), ties.method = "min"
    ),
    r_ATT_Abs_Bias = rank(
      ATT_Abs_Bias, ties.method = "min"
    )
  )

metric_levels <- c(
  "Bias", "Abs Bias", "ESE",
  "ModSE/ESE", "CI Coverage",
  "ATT Bias", "ATT Abs Bias"
)

metric_recode <- c(
  r_Bias         = "Bias",
  r_Abs_Bias     = "Abs Bias",
  r_ESE          = "ESE",
  r_Ratio        = "ModSE/ESE",
  r_Coverage     = "CI Coverage",
  r_ATT_Bias     = "ATT Bias",
  r_ATT_Abs_Bias = "ATT Abs Bias"
)

# 2. Bubble table
rank_pal <- c(
  "1" = "#2d6a4f",
  "2" = "#74c69d",
  "3" = "#d6d1c8",
  "4" = "#e07b86",
  "5" = "#9b2335"
)

rank_text_pal <- c(
  "1" = "white",
  "2" = "grey15",
  "3" = "grey40",
  "4" = "white",
  "5" = "white"
)

# Pivot summary_df to long for joining values
summary_long <- summary_df |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols      = -Treatment,
    names_to  = "metric_key",
    values_to = "raw_val"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Metric = dplyr::recode(
      metric_key,
      Bias         = "Bias",
      Abs_Bias     = "Abs Bias",
      ESE          = "ESE",
      Ratio        = "ModSE/ESE",
      Coverage     = "CI Coverage",
      ATT_Bias     = "ATT Bias",
      ATT_Abs_Bias = "ATT Abs Bias"
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(Treatment, Metric, raw_val)

bubble_long <- rank_df |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols      = starts_with("r_"),
    names_to  = "Metric",
    values_to = "Rank"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Metric    = dplyr::recode(Metric, !!!metric_recode),
    Metric    = factor(Metric, levels = metric_levels),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = rev(trt_order)),
    fill_col  = rank_pal[as.character(Rank)],
    text_col  = rank_text_pal[as.character(Rank)],
    bub_size  = dplyr::case_when(
      Rank %in% c(1, 5) ~ 14,
      Rank %in% c(2, 4) ~ 11,
      TRUE              ~ 8
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(summary_long, by = c("Treatment", "Metric")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Value = dplyr::case_when(
      Metric == "Bias"         ~ sprintf("%.3f", raw_val),
      Metric == "Abs Bias"     ~ sprintf("%.3f", raw_val),
      Metric == "ESE"          ~ sprintf("%.2f", raw_val),
      Metric == "ModSE/ESE"    ~ sprintf("%.2f", raw_val),
      Metric == "CI Coverage"  ~ paste0(
        sprintf("%.1f", raw_val * 100), "%"
      ),
      Metric == "ATT Bias"     ~ paste0(
        "$", scales::comma(round(raw_val))
      ),
      Metric == "ATT Abs Bias" ~ paste0(
        "$", scales::comma(round(raw_val))
      )
    )
  )

bubble_subtitle <- paste0(
  "Ranking: closest to 0 = Bias, ATT Bias  \u00b7  ",
  "lower = Abs Bias, ESE, ATT Abs Bias  \u00b7  ",
  "higher = ModSE/ESE, CI Coverage"
)

bubble_caption <- paste0(
  "Green = best (rank 1)  \u00b7  ",
  "Red = worst (rank 5)  \u00b7  ",
  "Bubble size reflects rank extremity"
)

p_bubble <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    bubble_long,
    ggplot2::aes(x = Metric, y = Treatment)
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "segment",
    x        = 5.5,
    xend     = 5.5,
    y        = 0.4,
    yend     = 5.6,
    color    = "grey75",
    linewidth = 0.6,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    ggplot2::aes(size = I(bub_size), fill = I(fill_col)),
    shape  = 21,
    color  = "white",
    stroke = 0.4
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(label = Rank, color = I(text_col)),
    size     = 3.2,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_text(
    ggplot2::aes(label = Value),
    nudge_y  = 0.38,
    size     = 2.4,
    color    = "black",
    fontface = "plain"
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(
    position = "top",
    limits   = metric_levels
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(add = c(0.7, 0.8))
  ) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title    = paste0(
      "Data Treatment Method",
      " Performance: Rank Summary"
    ),
    subtitle = bubble_subtitle,
    x        = NULL,
    y        = NULL,
    caption  = bubble_caption
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title       = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0
    ),
    plot.subtitle    = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 8, color = "grey40", hjust = 0
    ),
    plot.caption     = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 8, color = "grey40", hjust = 0
    ),
    axis.text.x.top  = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 9, face = "bold", color = "grey25"
    ),
    axis.text.y      = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 10, color = "grey20"
    ),
    panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_line(
      color = "grey92"
    ),
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin      = ggplot2::margin(
      t = 20, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10
    )
  )

p_bubble

# Save
# View saved PNG (not RStudio pane) for true render quality
ggplot2::ggsave(
  here::here(paste0("figures/bubble_summary.png")),
  plot   = p_bubble,
  width  = 9,
  height = 4.5,
  dpi    = 300
)
```  

Rank bump  

```{r}

# p_bump - rank bump chart
# Requires p_bubble code to have been run first (uses rank_df, trt_colors,
# trt_order, metric_levels, metric_recode)

bump_long <- rank_df |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols      = starts_with("r_"),
    names_to  = "Metric",
    values_to = "Rank"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Metric = dplyr::recode(Metric, !!!metric_recode),
    Metric = factor(Metric, levels = metric_levels),
    Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = trt_order)
  )

bump_labels <- bump_long |>
  dplyr::filter(Metric == "ATT Abs Bias")

bump_caption <- paste0(
  "Ranking: closest to 0 = Bias, ATT Bias  \u00b7  ",
  "lower = Abs Bias, ESE, ATT Abs Bias  \u00b7  ",
  "higher = ModSE/ESE, CI Coverage"
)

# x positions for annotations (numeric positions on discrete axis)
# metric_levels order: Bias=1, Abs Bias=2, ESE=3, ModSE/ESE=4,
#   CI Coverage=5, ATT Bias=6, ATT Abs Bias=7
# Divider goes between CI Coverage (5) and ATT Bias (6)

p_bump <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    bump_long,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x     = as.numeric(Metric),
      y     = Rank,
      group = Treatment,
      color = Treatment
    )
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "segment",
    x        = 5.5,
    xend     = 5.5,
    y        = 0.6,
    yend     = 5.4,
    color    = "grey80",
    linewidth = 0.7,
    linetype = "dashed"
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "text",
    x        = 3,
    y        = 0.3,
    label    = "GAMMA INTERACTION TERM",
    size     = 2.6,
    color    = "#4a6fa5",
    fontface = "bold",
    hjust    = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::annotate(
    "text",
    x        = 6.5,
    y        = 0.3,
    label    = "ATT",
    size     = 2.6,
    color    = "#c17f3b",
    fontface = "bold",
    hjust    = 0.5
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = 1.1) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(
    ggplot2::aes(fill = Treatment),
    size   = 3.5,
    shape  = 21,
    color  = "white",
    stroke = 1.2
  ) +
  ggrepel::geom_label_repel(
    data               = bump_labels,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x     = as.numeric(Metric),
      label = Treatment
    ),
    nudge_x            = 0.8,
    hjust              = 0,
    size               = 3,
    label.size         = NA,
    fill               = NA,
    fontface           = "bold",
    show.legend        = FALSE,
    direction          = "y",
    segment.size       = 0.3,
    segment.color      = "grey70",
    min.segment.length = 0.2
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = 1:7,
    labels = metric_levels,
    expand = ggplot2::expansion(add = c(0.3, 2.5))
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_y_reverse(
    breaks = 1:5,
    labels = c("1st\n(best)", "2nd", "3rd", "4th", "5th\n(worst)")
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(values = trt_colors) +
  ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(values  = trt_colors) +
  ggplot2::coord_cartesian(
    ylim = c(5.4, 0.2), clip = "off"
  ) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    title    = "Rank Across Outcomes by Treatment Method",
    subtitle = "Rank 1 = best performer on each metric",
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Rank",
    caption  = bump_caption
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  ggplot2::theme(
    legend.position    = "none",
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title         = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0
    ),
    plot.subtitle      = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 9, color = "grey40", hjust = 0
    ),
    plot.caption       = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 8, color = "grey40", hjust = 0
    ),
    axis.text.x        = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 9, face = "bold", color = "grey25"
    ),
    axis.text.y        = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 9, color = "grey30"
    ),
    axis.title.y       = ggplot2::element_text(
      size = 9, color = "grey40"
    ),
    panel.grid.major.x = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_line(
      color = "grey90"
    ),
    panel.grid.minor   = ggplot2::element_blank(),
    plot.margin        = ggplot2::margin(
      t = 20, r = 90, b = 10, l = 10
    )
  )

p_bump

ggplot2::ggsave(
  here::here(paste0("figures/rank_bump_", dt, ".png")),
  plot   = p_bump,
  width  = 9,
  height = 5,
  dpi    = 300
)

```
